name: Goose Island Golf Club
address: 1333 N Kingsbury St Suite 103, Chicago, IL 60642
about: Goose Island Golf Club is a members-only indoor golf facility located in Chicago's Lincoln Park neighborhood, featuring six private simulator bays powered by Trackman technology. The venue emphasizes unlimited play with 24/7 access, catering to golfers seeking flexible practice and play opportunities outside traditional course hours. It combines golf simulation with premium amenities including a private cigar lounge, BYOB policy, and a dedicated fitness center, positioning itself as a comprehensive golf and social destination for serious golfers in an urban setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited 24/7 access for flexible practice and play on any schedule
Premium Trackman technology trusted by PGA TOUR professionals for tour-level accuracy
Exclusive private community with member events, leagues, and tournaments
Premium amenities including private cigar lounge and BYOB policy
Onsite PGA professionals for personalized coaching and skill development

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen and food service available in the facility
BYOB policy - patrons can bring their own alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Six private simulator bays using Trackman technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if members must bring their own. It's recommended to contact the club directly for equipment details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Goose Island Golf Club has a BYOB policy, allowing members to bring their own alcoholic beverages. The facility also has a kitchen and food service available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify exact timing for 18 holes. With Trackman technology and six simulator bays, play time would likely vary depending on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention kid-friendly policies or activities. As a members-only club with a cigar lounge, it appears geared toward adult golfers.
